categories.label: Vulnerabilities
categories.blurb: Known CVEs and software flaws in services running on your assets.

categories.label: Service Exposure
categories.blurb: Admin panels, dev tools, databases, and cloud assets reachable from the internet.

categories.label: Data Leaks
categories.blurb: Secrets, credentials, configuration files, and source code exposed in public repos or directly on the asset.

categories.label: Misconfigurations
categories.blurb: CORS, open redirects, default credentials, and accessible admin endpoints.

categories.label: Security Hygiene
categories.blurb: Expiring certificates, missing security headers, weak DMARC/SPF, and end-of-life software stacks.

categories.label: Lookalike Domains
categories.blurb: Typosquats, homoglyph confusables, TLD swaps, and other domains registered to impersonate yours.
